rules.rule_text:
rule port_forward_tool
{
	meta:
		author = "@patrickrolsen"
		reference = "Port Forwarding Tool"
		filetype = "EXE"
		version = "0.1"
		date = "1/30/2014"

	strings:
		$s1 = "%d.%d.%d.%d"
		$s2 = "%i.%i.%i.%i on port %i"
		$s3 = "connect to %s:%i"
		$s4 = "%s:%i established"
		$s5 = "%s:%i closed"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and ( all of ( $s* ) )
}
